h1: Before and After Modern Farmhouse Fireplace Makeover
h2: Stylish & Safe: The Modern Fireplace Every Family Room Needs
How to Install a Gas Fireplace Insert

paragraphs: The ChallengeModernize an outdated living room and update the fireplace, the first phase of an interior restoration.The ProjectWhen interior designer, realtor, and home-renovator Katie Kurtz, with Adorned Homes, saw the picturesque property in North Oaks, Minnesota she quickly saw the inherit potential. “The bones of the property were amazing, with the two-story ceiling and the fireplace with high windows on each side as a focal point,” she noted.Katie’s vision was inspired by Restoration Hardware showrooms in Chicago, think “Old-World mixed with modern, luxurious furnishings and décor.” She first added beams to create a more intimate atmosphere while maintaining the majestic proportions of the steep ceilings.Upgrading the fireplace was paramount, so she energized the space by replacing the old wood-burning fireplace with a Heat & Glo Escape I-35 FireBrick gas fireplace insert."A gas insert gives so much more ease of use,” Katie said. “I love the option to have the flame on or just the glowing ember lights for the ambiance you want, winter or summer. I wanted to create a space that is unique and beautiful in its own way but will also appeal to different people for future resale."The retrofit product used the home’s existing gas line connection and chimney to accommodate fuel and venting respectively.Inspired by Katie's fireplace makeover? Our network of fireplace pros is here to help you find the perfect fireplace for your space and aesthetic. Request a consultation today to get started on your project.
A gas insert gives so much more ease of use.
Find out how an interior designer turned this fireplace into the heart of a cozy, multi-functional space.
When it comes to making over an old, wood-burning fireplace, it doesn’t get easier than installing an electric fireplace insert.
Browse our photo gallery to find a fireplace design that reflects your unique style.
